synopsis:
Newly raised Jedi Knight Keeve Trennis heads out on her first mission at her new rank alongside her former Master Sskeer and the Kotabi bond-twins Terec and Ceret. Answering a scrambled distress signal in the Kazlin system, they find a destroyed starship surrounded by bodies and gas, the signs of a Nihil attack. Searching the wreck, they discover slain Hutts and their guards, cargo of Vratixian barley used in bacta, and a lone surviving Nihil. Sskeer hunts the pirate down and, in an unsettling rage, kills and mutilates the body, drawing a rebuke from Marshal Avar Kriss.

Tracing the ship's course to the Sedri system, Avar dispatches Sskeer and Ceret to the arable colony world of Sedri Minor while she and Vernestra Rwoh recover the Hutt vessel. On Sedri Minor a wary farmer, Kalo Sulman, insists the independent colony wants no Jedi. While Sskeer questions him, Ceret follows a beckoning figure into the barley field, and a vine-like tentacle rises behind the Jedi.

Aboard the derelict, the bond-twin Terec suddenly cries out that something terrible has happened to Ceret. Sskeer runs into the field but finds only Ceret's lightsaber jutting from a mound of dirt, and no trace of his fellow Jedi.
title: The High Republic (2021) #02
